_note: Database pet: pet_id (hex, sap xep TANG DAN). name = ten pet. skills = danh sach skill id (combo train). Danh thuong (10000) luon co, khong can liet ke. Pet KHONG co skill combo thi KHONG can them (bot tu danh thuong). pet_id doc tu log 'Pet id=0x...' luc login; skill xac nhan qua combat (goi 0x32 unit=2).
